# x-twitter-scraper_event (Data Source)

Activity events from monitored accounts



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `data` (Map of String) Event payload — shape varies by event type (JSON)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `monitor_id` (String)
- `occurred_at` (String)
- `type` (String) Type of monitor event fired when account activity occurs.
Available values: "tweet.new", "tweet.reply", "tweet.retweet", "tweet.quote".
- `username` (String)
- `x_event_id` (String)
